nasb.text: So Jephthah crossed over to the sons of Ammon to fight against them; and the Lord gave them into his hand.

esv.text: So Jephthah crossed over to the Ammonites to fight against them, and the Lord gave them into his hand.

cnv.text: 於是耶弗他去到亞捫人那裡攻打他們，耶和華把他們交在他手裡。

ccb.text: 于是，耶弗他率军与亚扪人作战，耶和华把敌人交在他手中，
